case_title: ULANOVSKY, MARINA vs. SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF DEC-12-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON DEC-12-1996, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO ENTER DEFAULT IN THIS ACTION. HEARING SET FOR JAN-23-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ULANOVSKY, MARINA SERVED SEP-20-1996, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-13-1996, CONTINUED TO DEC-12-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR ANSWER OR ENTRY OF DEFAULT. PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
